---
title: "Pitch Shape Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
pitch_shapes <- read_csv("data/419_pitch_shapes.csv")
```

MANOVA:
```{r}
manova.pitch_shapes <- manova(cbind(relspeed,spinrate,inducedvertbreak,horzbreak) ~ as.factor(pitcher),
                              data = pitch_shapes)

H <- summary(manova.pitch_shapes)$SS$"as.factor(pitcher)"
E <- summary(manova.pitch_shapes)$SS$Residuals

H
E
```

Lambdas:
```{r}
lambdas <- eigen(solve(E)%*%H)$values
lambdas
```

Wilk's Test:
```{r}
summary(manova.pitch_shapes, test = "Wilks")

```

Roy's Test:
```{r}
theta <- lambdas[1]/(1+lambdas[1])
theta
summary(manova.pitch_shapes, test = "Roy")
```

Pillai's Test:
```{r}
summary(manova.pitch_shapes, test = "Pillai")
```

Hotelling-Lawley's Test:
```{r}
summary(manova.pitch_shapes, test = "Hotelling-Lawley")
```
